title: Food Production and Inventory Workflow
excerpt: im looking to create a board / workflow for my CPG business, www.wellingtons.la. Ive been unsuccessful with setting up Odoo.com and want to create a board and workflow on Monday.com to track inventory, sales, lot codes, …

posts.author: parkingandpastry (Arya Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
im looking to create a board / workflow for my CPG business, www.wellingtons.la. Ive been unsuccessful with setting up Odoo.com and want to create a board and workflow on Monday.com to track inventory, sales, lot codes, depletion, production, etc.

My goal is to easily be able to create a production plan and schedule with predefined values such as cost per SKU, packaging cost, etc.

Anyone have any suggestions on how to build this out?

posts.author: henry-jordan (henry-jordan)
posts.cookedHtml: “Having a smooth workflow really makes a difference – I’ve found that organizing ingredients by category and updating inventory daily helps cut down on waste. It also keeps production more consistent and saves a lot of stress during busy hours.”
